Home Essentials Manicure Pedicure Foot Scrubber Foot File Callus Remover - Red

Treat your feet with the Manicure Pedicure Foot Scrubber Foot File Callus Remover Callus Shaver! We walk hundreds, potentially thousands of miles every year, which means we need to pay extra special attention to our feet! With this classic handheld pedicure foot file callus remover tool, you’ll be able to painlessly remove dry, dead, cracked or flaky skin, as well as corns and calluses from your feet, heels and soles and toes.

Key Features

  • EASILY REMOVE CALLUS: The classic handheld pedicure foot file tool is a fast, effective and painless solution to remove dry skin and calluses from the bottom of your feet, soles, toes and heels; essential for overall foot care and maintenance that works to remove dry, dead, hard, cracked skin and avoid hard skin build up in the future
  • ERGONOMIC LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Weighing just two (2) ounces, the callus remover foot file is incredibly lightweight; the ergonomic slightly curved handle fits comfortably into the palm of your hand allowing you to scrub, file and maneuver the foot callus remover with ease and efficiency for smooth, beautiful, baby-soft feet
  • WET OR DRY FOOT SCRUBBER: The callus remover foot scrubber is suitable to use on dry or wet skin; The sharp metal plate for scrubbing is gentle but effective in removing excess keratin and dead skin, restoring your foot and heels softness
  • FOR BEST RESULTS: Soak feet for a couple of minutes in warm water to soften skin before using the foot file; this ensures the most effective results by softening hard skin before filing; the metal filing plane remains sharp and effective even after multiple uses; rinse foot scrubber with warm water when finished to remove dead skin
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8 inches; Weight: 2 ounces (oz); Color: Red or Blue; Material: Plastic handle, metal callus remover filing plate; Handheld tool, no batteries required

Product Specifications

  • MPN: HECALRRED1
  • UPC: 810058481191
  • Color: Red
  • Size: 8 in

Fast, effective and lightweight, the foot file callus remover tool is essential for overall foot care and maintenance and will not only work to remove dry, dead, hard, cracked skin, but also avoid hard skin build up in the future that could lead to further foot ailments or even injury.

Weighing just two (2) ounces (oz), the callus remover foot file features an ergonomically designed, slightly curved handle fits comfortably into the palm of your hand allowing you to scrub, file and maneuver the foot callus remover with ease and efficiency for smooth, beautiful, baby-soft feet. In addition, the callus remover foot scrubber is suitable to use on dry or wet skin; The sharp metal plate for scrubbing is gentle but effective in removing excess keratin and dead skin, restoring your foot and heels softness.

FOR BEST RESULTS: Soak feet for a couple of minutes in warm water to soften skin before using the foot file; this ensures the most effective results by softening hard skin before filing; the metal filing plane remains sharp and effective even after multiple uses; rinse foot scrubber with warm water when finished to remove dead skin.
